text: CLAIM NO: ENF 003/2010 THE JUDICIAL AUTHORITY OF THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE Between

ORDER OF EXECUTION IN DUBAI THIS ORDER OF EXECUTION WAS ISSUED by H.E. Justice Ali Al Madhani of the Judicial Authority of the Dubai International Financial Centre ("DIFC Courts"), Ground Level, Building 4, Dubai - UAE on 19th January 2010 on the written application of Omar Kadrie dated 10th January 2010. The name and address for enforcement is Lumidiem Limited,
Burjuman Business Tower, Level 19, Suite 1906, Dubai, UAE. BY ORDER OF THE COURTS TO:
Amna Alowais, a person authorised to enforce Orders of execution issued from the DIFC Courts. YOU

ARE NOW COMMANDED to seize in execution the goods, chattels and other property of the Defendant as authorised by law and raise therefrom the sums detailed in the Schedule, and after execution to pay the Claimant, Omar Kadrie the said sums. YOU ARE ALSO COMMANDED to endorse on this Order after execution a statement of the manner in which you have executed it and send a copy of the statement to the Defendant.   H.E. Justice Ali Al Madhani DIFC Courts Issue Date: 19th January 2010 at 10am
SCHEDULE TO ORDER OF EXECUTION IN ENF 003/2010

table_body:
(1) Date of Orders15th December 2009 and 21st December 2009
(2) Amount of OrdersAED 31,237.05 and AED 93,712.00 plus Court Fees of AED 367.50
TotalAED 125,316.55

text: Together with: Judgment interest from the date the judgments were entered, 15h December 2009 and 21st December 2009, at the rate of $1 \%$ over the Emirates Interbank Offer Rate ("EIBOR"). EIBOR is in reference to the EIBOR three months' reference rate as at the date of judgment.
